title: coleus idukkianus
intro: Coleus idukkianus, a plant species native to India, is a member of the Lamiaceae family and is commonly known as Indian Coleus. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Coleus idukkianus include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Coleus idukkianus include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are prepared by boiling the leaves or roots in water and then applying them topically or consuming them orally.
